summary: Audio plagued by microphone/cable problems and riser bleed, with no clear musical highlights noted
review: The recording suffers from significant technical flaws – frequent mic or cable drop‑outs in the first set and pervasive footstep noise from taper rigs on the risers. Reviewers provide no commentary on the performance itself, making the show quality indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Three reviews focus mainly on poor recording issues (2‑3 stars) and give no positive musical feedback; with limited data the rating reflects a subpar listening experience.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Frequent microphone/cable problems, undocumented cuts (e.g., missing start of Desolation), and heavy footstep/riser bleed throughout the tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
